controls.control_objective: To ensure be called the reserve bank of india (relief measures by banks in areas affected by natural calamities) directions, 2017
controls.control_description: (a) These Directions shall be called the Reserve Bank of India (Relief Measures by Banks in Areas Affected by Natural Calamities) Directions, 2017.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be called the reserve bank of india (relief measures by banks in areas affected by natural calamities) directions, 2017

controls.control_objective: To ensure come into effect on the day they are placed on the official website of the reserve bank of india
controls.control_description: (b) These Directions shall come into effect on the day they are placed on the official website of the Reserve Bank of India.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to come into effect on the day they are placed on the official website of the reserve bank of india

controls.control_objective: To ensure apply to every scheduled commercial bank {including small finance banks (sfbs) and excluding regional rural banks(rrbs)} licensed to operate in india
controls.control_description:
Applicability
The provisions of these Directions shall apply to every Scheduled Commercial Bank {including Small Finance Banks (SFBs) and excluding Regional Rural Banks(RRBs)} licensed to operate in India by Reserve Bank of India.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to apply to every scheduled commercial bank {including small finance banks (sfbs) and excluding regional rural banks(rrbs)} licensed to operate in india

controls.control_objective: To ensure be familiar with these standing instructions
controls.control_description: Further, all Divisional/Zonal Offices and branches of Scheduled Commercial/Small Finance banks should be familiar with these standing instructions.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be familiar with these standing instructions

controls.control_objective: To ensure also be made available to the state government authorities and all the district collectors so that all concerned are aware about the action that shoul
controls.control_description: It is essential that these instructions should also be made available to the State Government authorities and all the District Collectors so that all concerned are aware about the action that should be taken by the concerned authorities in the affected area.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to also be made available to the state government authorities and all the district collectors so that all concerned are aware about the action that shoul

controls.control_objective: To ensure be vested with certain discretionary powers to avoid the need to seek fresh approval from their central office regarding the line of action decided by
controls.control_description:
3.2 Discretionary Powers to Divisional / Zonal Manager of banks
The Divisional/Zonal Managers of scheduled commercial/SF banks must be vested with certain discretionary powers to avoid the need to seek fresh approval from their Central Office regarding the line of action decided by the District Consultative Committee/State Level Bankers' Committee.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be vested with certain discretionary powers to avoid the need to seek fresh approval from their central office regarding the line of action decided by

controls.control_objective: To ensure be the adoption of scale of finance, extension of loan period, margin, security, sanction of new loan keeping in view the total liability of the borro
controls.control_description: Some of the areas, among others where such discretionary powers are vital may be the adoption of scale of finance, extension of loan period, margin, security, sanction of new loan keeping in view the total liability of the borrower arising out of the old loan where the asset financed is damaged or lost due to the natural calamity and the new loan financed for creation/repair of such asset(s).
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be the adoption of scale of finance, extension of loan period, margin, security, sanction of new loan keeping in view the total liability of the borro

controls.control_objective: To ensure convene a meeting immediately
controls.control_description: 3.3.1 In the event of an occurrence of a natural calamity which covers a larger part of a State, the State Level Bankers' Committee convener bank should convene a meeting immediately.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to convene a meeting immediately

controls.control_objective: To ensure evolve a coordinated action plan for implementing the relief programme
controls.control_description: The committee, in collaboration with the State Government authorities should evolve a coordinated action plan for implementing the relief programme.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to evolve a coordinated action plan for implementing the relief programme

controls.control_objective: To ensure convene a meeting immediately
controls.control_description: If the calamity has affected only a small part of the state/few districts, the convener of the District Consultative Committee of the affected district(s) should convene a meeting immediately.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to convene a meeting immediately

controls.control_objective: To ensure be assessed so as to ensure speedy formulation and implementation of suitable relief measures
controls.control_description: In the special SLBC/DCC meeting, the position of the affected areas may be assessed so as to ensure speedy formulation and implementation of suitable relief measures.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be assessed so as to ensure speedy formulation and implementation of suitable relief measures

controls.control_objective: To ensure be reviewed periodically through a specially constituted task force/sub- committee by way of weekly/fortnightly meetings as decided by the slbc/dcc
controls.control_description: 3.3.2 In the areas where the calamity is severe, the relief measure(s) implemented should be reviewed periodically through a specially constituted Task Force/Sub- Committee by way of weekly/fortnightly meetings as decided by the SLBC/DCC.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be reviewed periodically through a specially constituted task force/sub- committee by way of weekly/fortnightly meetings as decided by the slbc/dcc

controls.control_objective: To ensure be 33% or more
controls.control_description:
Nevertheless, the common thread to extend
Page 4 of 13
relief measures including reschedulement of loans by banks, is that the crop loss assessed should be 33% or more.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be 33% or more

controls.control_objective: To ensure explain the reasons for not estimating 'annewari' (percentage of crop loss - by whatever name called) through crop cutting experiments and that the de
controls.control_description: when it is largely clear that most of the standing crops have been damaged and/or land and other assets have suffered a wide-spread damage, the matter be deliberated by State Government/District Authorities in the especially convened SLBC/DCC meetings where the concerned Government functionary/District Collector may explain the reasons for not estimating 'Annewari' (percentage of crop loss - by whatever name called) through crop cutting experiments and that the decision to provide relief for the affected populace needs to be taken based on the eye estimate/visual impressions.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to explain the reasons for not estimating 'annewari' (percentage of crop loss - by whatever name called) through crop cutting experiments and that the de

controls.control_objective: To ensure become necessary
controls.control_description: Therefore, relief in loan repayment, by restructuring the existing loan may become necessary.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to become necessary

controls.control_objective: To ensure be eligible for restructuring
controls.control_description: 4.1.1 All short-term loans, except those which are overdue at the time of occurrence of natural calamity, should be eligible for restructuring.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be eligible for restructuring

controls.control_objective: To ensure be converted into term loan
controls.control_description: The principal amount of the short-term loan as well as interest due for repayment in the year of occurrence of the natural calamity may be converted into term loan.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be converted into term loan

controls.control_objective: To ensure vary depending on the severity of the calamity, the impact on loss of economic assets and distress it caused
controls.control_description: 4.1.2 The repayment period of the restructured loan may vary depending on the severity of the calamity, the impact on loss of economic assets and distress it caused.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to vary depending on the severity of the calamity, the impact on loss of economic assets and distress it caused

controls.control_objective: To ensure be allowed if the loss is between 33% and 50%
controls.control_description: A maximum repayment period of up to 2 years (including the moratorium period of 1 year) should be allowed if the loss is between 33% and 50%.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be allowed if the loss is between 33% and 50%

controls.control_objective: To ensure be extended upto a maximum of 5 years (including the 1 year moratorium period)
controls.control_description:
If the crop
Page 5 of 13
loss is 50% or more, repayment period may be extended upto a maximum of 5 years (including the 1 year moratorium period).
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be extended upto a maximum of 5 years (including the 1 year moratorium period)

controls.control_objective: To ensure be considered
controls.control_description: 4.1.3 In all restructured loan accounts, moratorium period of at least one year should be considered.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be considered

controls.control_objective: To ensure also not insist on additional collateral security for such restructured loans
controls.control_description: Banks should also not insist on additional collateral security for such restructured loans.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to also not insist on additional collateral security for such restructured loans

controls.control_objective: To ensure be rescheduled keeping in view the repaying capacity of the borrower and the nature of natural calamity viz
controls.control_description: 4.2.1 The existing term loan installments should be rescheduled keeping in view the repaying capacity of the borrower and the nature of natural calamity viz.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be rescheduled keeping in view the repaying capacity of the borrower and the nature of natural calamity viz

controls.control_objective: To ensure reschedule the payment of installment during the year of natural calamity and extend the loan period by one year
controls.control_description: 4.2.1.3 In regard to natural calamity under category (4.2.1.1) above, the banks may reschedule the payment of installment during the year of natural calamity and extend the loan period by one year.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to reschedule the payment of installment during the year of natural calamity and extend the loan period by one year

controls.control_objective: To ensure also have to postpone payment of interest by borrowers
controls.control_description: The banks may also have to postpone payment of interest by borrowers.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to also have to postpone payment of interest by borrowers

controls.control_objective: To ensure be determined on the basis of overall repaying capacity of the borrower vis-a-vis his total liability (old term loan, restructured crop loan
controls.control_description: where the borrower's assets are partially/totally damaged, the rescheduling by way of extension of loan period may be determined on the basis of overall repaying capacity of the borrower vis-a-vis his total liability (old term loan, restructured crop loan, if any and the fresh crop/term loan being given) less the subsidies received from the Government agencies, compensation available under the insurance schemes, etc.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be determined on the basis of overall repaying capacity of the borrower vis-a-vis his total liability (old term loan, restructured crop loan

controls.control_objective: To ensure exceed a period of 5 years
controls.control_description: While the total repayment period for the restructured/fresh term loan will differ on case-to-case basis, generally it should not exceed a period of 5 years.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to exceed a period of 5 years

controls.control_objective: To ensure be taken by the individual banks
controls.control_description: If such a decision is taken, while recovery of all the loans be postponed by the specified period, banks will have to assess the requirement of the individual borrowers in each such case and depending on the nature of his account, repayment capacity and the need for the fresh loans, appropriate decisions shall be taken by the individual banks
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be taken by the individual banks

controls.control_objective: To ensure be based on the viability of the venture after the rehabilitation programme is implemented
controls.control_description: 4.3.2 The primary consideration before the banks in extending credit to any unit for its rehabilitation should be based on the viability of the venture after the rehabilitation programme is implemented.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be based on the viability of the venture after the rehabilitation programme is implemented

controls.control_objective: To ensure be treated as current dues and need not be classified as npa
controls.control_description: 4.4.1 The restructured portion of the short term as well as long-term loans may be treated as current dues and need not be classified as NPA.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be treated as current dues and need not be classified as npa

controls.control_objective: To ensure to make higher provisions for such restructured standard advances as prescribed by department of banking regulation1 from time to time
controls.control_description: Nevertheless, banks are required to make higher provisions for such restructured standard advances as prescribed by Department of Banking Regulation1 from time to time.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to to make higher provisions for such restructured standard advances as prescribed by department of banking regulation1 from time to time

controls.control_objective: To ensure be classified by the lending bank under different asset classification categories viz
controls.control_description: Consequently, the dues from the borrower shall be classified by the lending bank under different asset classification categories viz.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be classified by the lending bank under different asset classification categories viz

controls.control_objective: To ensure be treated as "standard asset" and its future asset classification will be governed by the terms and conditions of its sanction
controls.control_description: Additional finance, if any, shall be treated as "standard asset" and its future asset classification will be governed by the terms and conditions of its sanction.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be treated as "standard asset" and its future asset classification will be governed by the terms and conditions of its sanction

controls.control_objective: To ensure immediately approach the concerned regional office of rbi detailing the reasons for seeking extension
controls.control_description:
In the event of extreme calamity, when the SLBC/DCC is of the view that this period will
1 DBR's Master Directions on Prudential Guidelines on Income Recognition, Asset Classification and Provisioning
Page 7 of 13
not be sufficient for the banks to reschedule all the affected loans, it should immediately approach the concerned Regional Office of RBI detailing the reasons for seeking extension.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to immediately approach the concerned regional office of rbi detailing the reasons for seeking extension

controls.control_objective: To ensure retain the same asset classification category on restructuring
controls.control_description: 4.4.5 The accounts that are restructured for the second time or more on account of recurrence of natural calamities should retain the same asset classification category on restructuring.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to retain the same asset classification category on restructuring

controls.control_objective: To ensure , ideally, compensate their losses
controls.control_description: 4.5.1 While the above measures relating to rescheduling of loans are intended to provide relief to the farmers, the insurance proceeds should, ideally, compensate their losses.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to , ideally, compensate their losses

controls.control_objective: To ensure to be entered by banks in the unified portal for crop insurance which is available at www
controls.control_description: Farmers' details are required to be entered by banks in the unified portal for crop insurance which is available at www.agri-insurance.gov.in in order to facilitate assessment of coverage of crops insured, premiums deducted, etc.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to to be entered by banks in the unified portal for crop insurance which is available at www

controls.control_objective: To ensure also take into account the insurance proceeds
controls.control_description: 4.5.2 While restructuring the loans in areas affected by a natural calamity, banks should also take into account the insurance proceeds, if any, receivable from the Insurance Company.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to also take into account the insurance proceeds

controls.control_objective: To ensure adjust these proceeds to the 'restructured accounts' in cases where they have granted fresh loan to the borrower
controls.control_description: They should adjust these proceeds to the 'restructured accounts' in cases where they have granted fresh loan to the borrower.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to adjust these proceeds to the 'restructured accounts' in cases where they have granted fresh loan to the borrower

controls.control_objective: To ensure act with empathy and consider restructuring and granting fresh loans without waiting for the receipt of insurance claim, in cases where there is reaso
controls.control_description: However, banks should act with empathy and consider restructuring and granting fresh loans without waiting for the receipt of insurance claim, in cases where there is reasonable certainty of receiving the claim.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to act with empathy and consider restructuring and granting fresh loans without waiting for the receipt of insurance claim, in cases where there is reaso

controls.control_objective: To ensure grant fresh crop loan to the affected people based on the scale of finance for the crop and the cultivation area, as per the extant guidelines2
controls.control_description: 5.1.1 Once the decision to reschedule loans is taken by SLBC/DCC, pending conversion of short-term loans, banks shall grant fresh crop loan to the affected people based on the scale of finance for the crop and the cultivation area, as per the extant guidelines2.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to grant fresh crop loan to the affected people based on the scale of finance for the crop and the cultivation area, as per the extant guidelines2

controls.control_objective: To ensure also be needed for long term loans for a variety of purposes such as repair of existing economic asset(s) and/or acquisition of new asset(s)
controls.control_description: 5.1.2 The bank assistance in agriculture and allied activities (poultry, fishery, animal husbandry, etc.) may also be needed for long term loans for a variety of purposes such as repair of existing economic asset(s) and/or acquisition of new asset(s).
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to also be needed for long term loans for a variety of purposes such as repair of existing economic asset(s) and/or acquisition of new asset(s)

controls.control_objective: To ensure require fresh credit to sustain their livelihood
controls.control_description: in the areas affected by a natural calamity may require fresh credit to sustain their livelihood.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to require fresh credit to sustain their livelihood

controls.control_objective: To ensure assess the need and decide on the quantum of loans to be granted to the affected borrowers taking into consideration, amongst others, their credit req
controls.control_description: Banks should assess the need and decide on the quantum of loans to be granted to the affected borrowers taking into consideration, amongst others, their credit requirement and the due procedure for sanctioning loans.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to assess the need and decide on the quantum of loans to be granted to the affected borrowers taking into consideration, amongst others, their credit req

controls.control_objective: To ensure also grant consumption loan up to ₹ 10,000/- to existing borrowers without any collateral
controls.control_description: Banks shall also grant consumption loan up to ₹ 10,000/- to existing borrowers without any collateral.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to also grant consumption loan up to ₹ 10,000/- to existing borrowers without any collateral

controls.control_objective: To ensure , however, be enhanced beyond ₹ 10,000/- at the bank's discretion
controls.control_description: The limit may, however, be enhanced beyond ₹ 10,000/- at the bank's discretion.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to , however, be enhanced beyond ₹ 10,000/- at the bank's discretion

controls.control_objective: To ensure be denied for want of personal guarantees
controls.control_description: 5.2.1.1 Credit should not be denied for want of personal guarantees.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be denied for want of personal guarantees

controls.control_objective: To ensure be granted even if the value of security (existing as well as the asset to be acquired from the new loan) is less than the loan amount
controls.control_description: The fresh loan shall be granted even if the value of security (existing as well as the asset to be acquired from the new loan) is less than the loan amount.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be granted even if the value of security (existing as well as the asset to be acquired from the new loan) is less than the loan amount

controls.control_objective: To ensure be denied conversion facility merely on the ground of his/her inability to furnish land as security
controls.control_description:
5.2.1.2 Where the crop loan (which has been converted into term loan) was earlier sanctioned against personal security/hypothecation of crop and the borrower is not able to offer charge/mortgage of land as security for the converted loan, she/he
2 Master circular on Kisan Credit card Scheme available @ www.rbi.org.in
Page 9 of 13
should not be denied conversion facility merely on the ground of his/her inability to furnish land as security.
controls.implementation_method: Implement reporting procedure to be denied conversion facility merely on the ground of his/her inability to furnish land as security

controls.control_objective: To ensure be content with a second charge for the converted term loan
controls.control_description: If the borrower has already taken a term loan against mortgage/charge on land, the bank should be content with a second charge for the converted term loan.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be content with a second charge for the converted term loan

controls.control_objective: To ensure insist on third party guarantee for providing conversion facility
controls.control_description: Banks should not insist on third party guarantee for providing conversion facility.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to insist on third party guarantee for providing conversion facility

controls.control_objective: To ensure be accepted for financing to farmers who have lost proof of their title such as title deed or registration certificate issued to registered share-crop
controls.control_description: 5.2.1.3 Where land is taken as security, in the absence of original title record, a certificate issued by the Revenue Department officials may be accepted for financing to farmers who have lost proof of their title such as title deed or registration certificate issued to registered share-croppers.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be accepted for financing to farmers who have lost proof of their title such as title deed or registration certificate issued to registered share-crop

controls.control_objective: To ensure be waived or the grant/subsidy given by the concerned state government may be considered as margin
controls.control_description: 5.2.1.4 Margin requirements may be waived or the grant/subsidy given by the concerned State Government may be considered as margin.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be waived or the grant/subsidy given by the concerned state government may be considered as margin

controls.control_objective: To ensure also suitably defer the compounding of interest charges
controls.control_description: The banks should also suitably defer the compounding of interest charges.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to also suitably defer the compounding of interest charges

controls.control_objective: To ensure levy any penal interest and consider waiving penal interest
controls.control_description: Banks may not levy any penal interest and consider waiving penal interest, if any, already charged in regard to the loans converted/rescheduled.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to levy any penal interest and consider waiving penal interest

controls.control_objective: To ensure take a view on the interest rate concession that could be extended to borrowers so that there is uniformity in approach among banks in providing relie
controls.control_description: Depending on the nature and severity of natural calamity, the SLBC/ DCC shall take a view on the interest rate concession that could be extended to borrowers so that there is uniformity in approach among banks in providing relief.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to take a view on the interest rate concession that could be extended to borrowers so that there is uniformity in approach among banks in providing relie

controls.control_objective: To ensure have access to their normal identification and personal records
controls.control_description:
6.1 Relaxation on Know Your Customer (KYC) Norms
It needs to be recognized that many persons displaced or adversely affected by a major calamity may not have access to their normal identification and personal records.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to have access to their normal identification and personal records

controls.control_objective: To ensure be opened
controls.control_description: In such cases a small account based on the photograph and signature or thumb impression rendered in front of the bank official shall be opened.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be opened

controls.control_objective: To ensure operate its natural calamity affected branches from temporary premises under advice to the concerned regional office of rbi
controls.control_description: 6.2.1 Banks may operate its natural calamity affected branches from temporary premises under advice to the concerned Regional Office of RBI.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to operate its natural calamity affected branches from temporary premises under advice to the concerned regional office of rbi

controls.control_objective: To ensure obtain specific approval from the concerned regional office of rbi
controls.control_description: For continuing the temporary premise beyond 30 days, banks may obtain specific approval from the concerned Regional Office of RBI.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to obtain specific approval from the concerned regional office of rbi

controls.control_objective: To ensure also make arrangements to render banking services in the affected areas by setting up satellite offices, extension counters or mobile banking faciliti
controls.control_description: Banks may also make arrangements to render banking services in the affected areas by setting up satellite offices, extension counters or mobile banking facilities etc.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to also make arrangements to render banking services in the affected areas by setting up satellite offices, extension counters or mobile banking faciliti

controls.control_objective: To ensure be given towards restoring the atms or other alternate arrangements maybe provided to avail such facilities
controls.control_description: 6.2.2 To meet the immediate cash requirement of the affected people, due importance may be given towards restoring the ATMs or other alternate arrangements maybe provided to avail such facilities.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be given towards restoring the atms or other alternate arrangements maybe provided to avail such facilities

controls.control_objective: To ensure initiate at their discretion to alleviate the condition of the affected people could be waiving atm fees, increasing atm withdrawal limits
controls.control_description: 6.2.3 Other measures that banks may initiate at their discretion to alleviate the condition of the affected people could be waiving ATM fees, increasing ATM withdrawal limits;
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to initiate at their discretion to alleviate the condition of the affected people could be waiving atm fees, increasing atm withdrawal limits

controls.control_objective: To ensure be waived considering the hardship caused to the affected people
controls.control_description: Besides, all charges debited to the farm loan account other than the normal interest may be waived considering the hardship caused to the affected people.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be waived considering the hardship caused to the affected people

controls.control_objective: To ensure broadly be followed by banks for the purpose
controls.control_description: 7.1 Whenever RBI advises the banks to extend rehabilitation assistance to the riot/ disturbance affected persons, the aforesaid guidelines may broadly be followed by banks for the purpose.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to broadly be followed by banks for the purpose

controls.control_objective: To ensure , however, be ensured that only genuine persons, duly identified by the state administration as having been affected by the riots/ disturbances, are p
controls.control_description: It should, however, be ensured that only genuine persons, duly identified by the State Administration as having been affected by the riots/ disturbances, are provided assistance as per the guidelines.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to , however, be ensured that only genuine persons, duly identified by the state administration as having been affected by the riots/ disturbances, are p

controls.control_objective: To ensure ask the lead bank officer to convene a meeting of the dcc
controls.control_description: With a view to ensuring quick relief to the affected persons, it has been decided that the District Collector, on occurrence of the riots/ disturbances, may ask the Lead Bank Officer to convene a meeting of the DCC, if necessary and submit a report to the DCC on the extent of damage caused to life and property in the area affected by riots/disturbances.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to ask the lead bank officer to convene a meeting of the dcc

controls.control_objective: To ensure be extended to the people affected by the riots/ disturbances
controls.control_description: If the DCC is satisfied that there has been extensive loss to life and property on account of the riots/ disturbances, the relief as per the above guidelines may be extended to the people affected by the riots/ disturbances.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be extended to the people affected by the riots/ disturbances

controls.control_objective: To ensure request the convener of the state level bankers' committee of the state to convene a meeting of the bankers to consider extension of relief to the aff
controls.control_description: In certain cases, where there are no District Consultative Committees, the District Collector may request the convener of the State Level Bankers' Committee of the State to convene a meeting of the bankers to consider extension of relief to the affected persons.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to request the convener of the state level bankers' committee of the state to convene a meeting of the bankers to consider extension of relief to the aff

controls.control_objective: To ensure be recorded and should form a part of the minutes of the meeting
controls.control_description: The report submitted by the Collector and the decision thereon of DCC/ SLBC may be recorded and should form a part of the minutes of the meeting.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be recorded and should form a part of the minutes of the meeting

controls.control_objective: To ensure be forwarded to the concerned regional office of the reserve bank of india
controls.control_description: A copy of the proceedings of the meeting may be forwarded to the concerned Regional Office of the Reserve Bank of India.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be forwarded to the concerned regional office of the reserve bank of india
